Name: Causal Autoimmune Architecture Platform
Description: Rulebook for inferring the complete causal architecture of heterogeneous autoimmune disease from multi-omic cohort data, producing falsifiable mechanisms and ancestry-equitable predictions with calibrated uncertainty.

AutoimmuneDiseases.Description: Target heterogeneous autoimmune disease definitions tracked across development, aging, tissues, and disease stages.

schema.name: AutoimmuneDiseaseId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each autoimmune disease (e.g. sle, ra, t1d).

schema.name: DiseaseLabel
schema.Description: Human-readable disease name.

schema.name: IsComplexDisease
schema.Description: True when the disease is a multifactorial complex disease beyond simple monogenic traits.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label for the autoimmune disease.

schema.name: CountOfDiseaseStages
schema.Description: Number of disease stages defined for this autoimmune disease.

schema.name: CountOfInterventionTargets
schema.Description: Count of validated intervention targets linked to this disease.

schema.name: DiseaseStages
schema.Description: Disease stages for this autoimmune disease.

schema.name: Treatments
schema.Description: Treatment histories for this disease.

schema.name: ClinicalPhenotypes
schema.Description: Clinical phenotypes observed for this disease.

schema.name: IndividualPredictions
schema.Description: Predictions of disease onset, severity, and treatment response.

schema.name: CounterfactualTrajectories
schema.Description: Counterfactual disease trajectories for this disease.

schema.name: InterventionTargets
schema.Description: Experimentally falsifiable intervention targets.

DiseaseStages.Description: Ordered disease stages capturing presymptomatic, active, remission, and treatment-refractory phases along disease progression.

schema.name: DiseaseStageId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each disease stage.

schema.name: StageLabel
schema.Description: Human-readable stage label (e.g. presymptomatic, active).

schema.name: SortOrder
schema.Description: Numeric ordering of stages along disease progression.

schema.name: AutoimmuneDisease
schema.Description: Parent autoimmune disease.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label combining disease and stage.

schema.name: AutoimmuneDiseaseDiseaseLabel
schema.Description: Lookup of parent disease label.

schema.name: IsPresymptomatic
schema.Description: True when stage is presymptomatic diagnosis window.

Tissues.Description: Anatomical tissues where omics assays resolve cell-state-specific effects; includes cases of missing tissues.

schema.name: TissueId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each tissue type.

schema.name: TissueLabel
schema.Description: Human-readable tissue name (blood, gut, synovium, skin, brain).

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label for the tissue.

schema.name: CountOfOmicsAssays
schema.Description: Number of omics assays performed on this tissue.

schema.name: OmicsAssays
schema.Description: Omics assays performed on this tissue.

OmicsModalities.Description: Registry of omics assay modalities: RNA-seq, ATAC-seq, proteomics, metabolomics, methylomes, chromatin-conformation, immune-receptor repertoires, microbiomes, and long-read genomes.

schema.name: OmicsModalityId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each omics modality.

schema.name: ModalityLabel
schema.Description: Human-readable modality name.

schema.name: IsSingleCell
schema.Description: True for single-cell or spatial assays resolving cellular states.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label for the omics modality.

schema.name: CountOfOmicsAssays
schema.Description: Count of assays using this modality.

schema.name: OmicsAssays
schema.Description: Assays of this modality.

FederatedDatasets.Description: Privacy-preserving federated datasets contributing cohort partitions without centralizing raw genomes.

schema.name: FederatedDatasetId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each federated data node.

schema.name: NodeLabel
schema.Description: Human-readable federated node name.

schema.name: Region
schema.Description: Geographic region; shifting environments may alter exposure profiles.

schema.name: IsPrivacyPreserving
schema.Description: True when node uses privacy-preserving federated learning.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label for the federated dataset.

schema.name: CountOfIndividuals
schema.Description: Individuals enrolled via this federated node.

schema.name: Individuals
schema.Description: Individuals linked to this federated dataset.

schema.name: OmicsAssays
schema.Description: Omics assays sourced from this node.

schema.name: CohortReplications
schema.Description: Replications run in this cohort node.

VariantTypes.Description: Classification of genomic variant mechanisms: regulatory, coding, repeat expansions, mobile-element insertions, HLA haplotypes, structural variants, de novo mutations, somatic mosaicism, mitochondrial variation.

schema.name: VariantTypeId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each variant type.

schema.name: TypeLabel
schema.Description: Human-readable variant mechanism label.

schema.name: IsRareVariantClass
schema.Description: True when this type contributes to rare-variant burden scoring.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label for variant type.

schema.name: CountOfGenomicVariants
schema.Description: Variants classified under this type.

schema.name: GenomicVariants
schema.Description: Genomic variants of this type.

Individuals.Description: Ancestrally diverse cohort participants whose phased genomes, omics profiles, exposures, and clinical phenotypes feed causal architecture inference.

schema.name: IndividualId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each individual in the million-person cohort.

schema.name: GivenName
schema.Description: Participant given name (de-identified mock).

schema.name: FamilyName
schema.Description: Participant family name (de-identified mock).

schema.name: AncestryLabel
schema.Description: Ancestry label for population stratification and ancestry-equitable risk prediction.

schema.name: AgeYears
schema.Description: Age in years spanning development and aging windows.

schema.name: IsAncestryAbsentFromTraining
schema.Description: True when individual ancestry was absent from primary training data.

schema.name: FederatedDataset
schema.Description: Federated dataset node when enrolled via privacy-preserving federation.

schema.name: EnrollmentDate
schema.Description: Longitudinal cohort enrollment date.

schema.name: HasCrypticRelatednessFlag
schema.Description: True when cryptic relatedness or assortative mating bias detected.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name for the individual.

schema.name: FederatedDatasetNodeLabel
schema.Description: Lookup of federated node label.

schema.name: CountOfGenomicVariants
schema.Description: Total genomic variants for rare-variant burden assessment.

schema.name: CountOfCausalMechanisms
schema.Description: Inferred causal mechanisms linked to this individual.

schema.name: CountOfEpistaticInteractions
schema.Description: Higher-order epistasis interactions involving this individual.

schema.name: RareVariantBurdenScore
schema.Description: 2nd-order score from rare variant count normalized by age.

schema.name: CausalArchitectureScore
schema.Description: 3rd-order composite of causal mechanisms and epistasis density.

schema.name: IsDevelopmentWindow
schema.Description: True when age falls in developmental effects window (0-25).

schema.name: IsAgingWindow
schema.Description: True when age falls in aging window (60+).

schema.name: CountConfirmedCausalNodes
schema.Description: Count of this individual's confirmed causal-architecture nodes.

schema.name: SumConfirmedCausalConfidence
schema.Description: Summed confidence of this individual's confirmed causal nodes (derived causal mass).

schema.name: CountCrossAncestryConfirmedNodes
schema.Description: Confirmed nodes that also showed cross-ancestry replication.

schema.name: GenomicVariants
schema.Description: Genomic variants for this individual.

schema.name: OmicsAssays
schema.Description: Omics assays for this individual.

schema.name: EnvironmentalExposures
schema.Description: Longitudinal environmental exposures.

schema.name: Treatments
schema.Description: Treatment histories.

schema.name: ClinicalPhenotypes
schema.Description: Clinical phenotypes.

schema.name: CausalMechanisms
schema.Description: Inferred causal mechanisms.

schema.name: EpistaticInteractions
schema.Description: Epistatic interactions.

schema.name: CounterfactualTrajectories
schema.Description: Counterfactual trajectories.

schema.name: IndividualPredictions
schema.Description: Individual predictions.

GenomicVariants.Description: Genomic variant calls per individual spanning regulatory, coding, structural, HLA haplotypes, de novo mutations, somatic mosaicism, and mitochondrial variation.

schema.name: GenomicVariantId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each genomic variant record.

schema.name: VariantLabel
schema.Description: Human-readable variant label (gene/locus).

schema.name: Individual
schema.Description: Individual carrying this variant.

schema.name: VariantType
schema.Description: Variant mechanism classification.

schema.name: AlleleFrequency
schema.Description: Population allele frequency for rare-variant burden.

schema.name: HasAlleleSpecificExpression
schema.Description: True when allele-specific expression observed.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label.

schema.name: VariantTypeLabel
schema.Description: Lookup of variant type label.

schema.name: VariantClassIsRare
schema.Description: Whether this variant's class is a rare-variant class (observed type property).

schema.name: IndividualAncestryLabel
schema.Description: Lookup of individual ancestry for stratification checks.

schema.name: IsRareVariant
schema.Description: True when allele frequency below 0.01.

schema.name: IsCausalCandidate
schema.Description: Derived: rare (by frequency or class) AND shows allele-specific expression.

OmicsAssays.Description: Omics assay instances linking individuals to modalities and tissues; captures batch effects, measurement error, and missing tissues.

schema.name: OmicsAssayId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each omics assay.

schema.name: AssayLabel
schema.Description: Human-readable assay label.

schema.name: Individual
schema.Description: Individual assayed.

schema.name: OmicsModality
schema.Description: Omics modality used.

schema.name: Tissue
schema.Description: Tissue sampled; empty when missing tissues.

schema.name: FederatedDataset
schema.Description: Source federated node if applicable.

schema.name: BatchId
schema.Description: Sequencing batch for batch effects control.

schema.name: MeasurementErrorScore
schema.Description: Estimated measurement error (0-1).

schema.name: HasCellStateSpecificEffect
schema.Description: True when cell-state-specific effects detected.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label.

schema.name: ModalityLabel
schema.Description: Lookup of modality label.

schema.name: TissueLabel
schema.Description: Lookup of tissue label.

schema.name: HasBatchEffectRisk
schema.Description: True when measurement error exceeds 0.3.

schema.name: IsHighQualityAssay
schema.Description: 2nd-order quality flag.

schema.name: EvidenceItems
schema.Description: Evidence items measured in this assay.

EvidenceItems.Description: One observed support signal for a causal mechanism, measured by one omics assay. Mechanism confidence is an aggregation over these rows.

schema.name: EvidenceItemId
schema.Description: Stable id for this evidence observation.

schema.name: EvidenceLabel
schema.Description: Human label for the evidence row.

schema.name: CausalMechanism
schema.Description: FK to the mechanism this evidence supports.

schema.name: OmicsAssay
schema.Description: FK to the omics assay this signal was measured in.

schema.name: EffectSize
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: measured (absolute) effect magnitude.

schema.name: StandardError
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: measured standard error of the effect.

schema.name: IsCrossModality
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: TRUE if this signal comes from a different omics modality than the mechanism's primary one.

schema.name: IsNegativeControlArm
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: TRUE if this row is a measured control arm rather than support.

schema.name: IsAdjustedForAncestryPCs
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: TRUE if the analysis adjusted for ancestry principal components.

schema.name: IsAdjustedForBatch
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: TRUE if the analysis adjusted for batch.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name.

schema.name: AssayIsHighQuality
schema.Description: Whether the supporting assay passed quality control.

schema.name: ZStat
schema.Description: Derived signal-to-noise ratio (effect / SE), 0 if SE non-positive.

schema.name: IsConfoundControlled
schema.Description: Derived: both ancestry-PC and batch adjustment present.

schema.name: IsQualifiedEvidence
schema.Description: Derived: clean assay, real support arm, signal-to-noise >= 2, confound-controlled.

CohortReplications.Description: One re-test of a causal mechanism in another federated cohort. Replication and cross-ancestry transport are aggregations over these rows.

schema.name: CohortReplicationId
schema.Description: Stable id for this replication attempt.

schema.name: ReplicationLabel
schema.Description: Human label.

schema.name: CausalMechanism
schema.Description: FK to the mechanism being re-tested.

schema.name: FederatedDataset
schema.Description: FK to the cohort node the re-test ran in.

schema.name: ReplicationEffectSign
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: sign of the re-estimated effect (+1 / -1 / 0).

schema.name: ReplicationPValue
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: p-value of the re-test.

schema.name: ReplicationAncestryLabel
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: ancestry of the cohort the re-test ran in.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name.

schema.name: ReplicatedAtNominalSig
schema.Description: Derived: reproduced the predicted (positive) sign at nominal significance.

schema.name: MechanismPrimaryAncestry
schema.Description: Ancestry of the individual the mechanism was discovered in.

schema.name: IsDifferentAncestryReplication
schema.Description: Derived: the re-test ran in a different ancestry than discovery.

schema.name: IsCrossAncestryConcordant
schema.Description: Derived: replicated at significance AND in a different ancestry (the transportability atom).

NegativeControlTests.Description: One stratification / permutation control on a causal mechanism. A true causal signal collapses under the control.

schema.name: NegativeControlTestId
schema.Description: Stable id for this control test.

schema.name: ControlLabel
schema.Description: Human label.

schema.name: CausalMechanism
schema.Description: FK to the mechanism being controlled.

schema.name: TestKind
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: kind of control (ancestry-permutation / batch-stratified / negative-control).

schema.name: PermutationEffectSize
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: (absolute) effect measured under the null/permuted control.

schema.name: NullThreshold
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: pre-registered null-band half-width the control must stay within.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name.

schema.name: IsSurvived
schema.Description: Derived: signal collapses under the control (within the null band), as a true causal effect should.

EnvironmentalExposures.Description: Longitudinal environmental exposures contributing to gene-environment-microbiome interactions and shifting environments.

schema.name: EnvironmentalExposureId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each exposure record.

schema.name: ExposureLabel
schema.Description: Exposure name (smoking, UV, particulate, etc.).

schema.name: Individual
schema.Description: Exposed individual.

schema.name: ExposureLevel
schema.Description: Quantified exposure intensity.

schema.name: ExposureStartDate
schema.Description: Start of longitudinal exposure window.

schema.name: IsMaternalEffect
schema.Description: True when exposure reflects maternal developmental effects.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label.

schema.name: IndividualAncestryLabel
schema.Description: Ancestry lookup for stratification.

schema.name: IsHighExposure
schema.Description: True when exposure level exceeds threshold.

Treatments.Description: Treatment histories capturing treatment-induced changes, treatment response, and adverse effects.

schema.name: TreatmentId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each treatment record.

schema.name: TreatmentLabel
schema.Description: Therapy name.

schema.name: Individual
schema.Description: Treated individual.

schema.name: AutoimmuneDisease
schema.Description: Target autoimmune disease.

schema.name: TreatmentResponse
schema.Description: Response category: Complete, Partial, None, Adverse.

schema.name: HasTreatmentInducedChange
schema.Description: True when molecular state shifted due to therapy.

schema.name: HasAdverseEffect
schema.Description: True when adverse effects observed.

schema.name: StartDate
schema.Description: Treatment start date.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label.

schema.name: AutoimmuneDiseaseLabel
schema.Description: Disease label lookup.

schema.name: IsEffectiveTreatment
schema.Description: True for Complete or Partial response without adverse effects.

ClinicalPhenotypes.Description: Clinical phenotypes including severity, immune dysfunction markers, and feedback from disease progression.

schema.name: ClinicalPhenotypeId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each phenotype measurement.

schema.name: PhenotypeLabel
schema.Description: Phenotype name.

schema.name: Individual
schema.Description: Individual measured.

schema.name: AutoimmuneDisease
schema.Description: Related autoimmune disease.

schema.name: DiseaseStage
schema.Description: Disease stage at measurement.

schema.name: Tissue
schema.Description: Tissue context if applicable.

schema.name: SeverityScore
schema.Description: Disease severity (0-10).

schema.name: MeasurementDate
schema.Description: Date of phenotype assessment.

schema.name: HasImmuneDysfunction
schema.Description: True when immune dysfunction markers elevated.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label.

schema.name: DiseaseStageLabel
schema.Description: Stage label lookup.

schema.name: IsHighSeverity
schema.Description: True when severity exceeds 7.

schema.name: IsPresymptomaticPhenotype
schema.Description: True when stage is presymptomatic.

CausalMechanisms.Description: Inferred causal mechanisms linking variants, exposures, and molecular state to clinical phenotypes; must be experimentally falsifiable.

schema.name: CausalMechanismId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each causal mechanism hypothesis.

schema.name: MechanismLabel
schema.Description: Human-readable mechanism description.

schema.name: Individual
schema.Description: Individual for whom mechanism is inferred.

schema.name: GenomicVariant
schema.Description: Primary genomic variant if applicable.

schema.name: EnvironmentalExposure
schema.Description: Environmental exposure if gene-environment interaction.

schema.name: MechanismType
schema.Description: Type: regulatory, coding, gene-environment-microbiome, epigenetic-inheritance, enhancer-promoter, feedback.

schema.name: HasPleiotropy
schema.Description: True when mechanism shows pleiotropy across phenotypes.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label.

schema.name: IndividualAncestryLabel
schema.Description: Ancestry lookup.

schema.name: CountQualifiedEvidence
schema.Description: Count of qualified evidence items supporting this mechanism.

schema.name: CountModalitiesSupporting
schema.Description: Count of qualified cross-modality evidence items (multi-omic corroboration).

schema.name: CountInterventionTargets
schema.Description: Count of perturbable intervention targets for this mechanism (falsifiability requires >=1).

schema.name: IsExperimentallyFalsifiable
schema.Description: Derived: a measurable qualified effect exists AND a named intervention can perturb it.

schema.name: CountReplications
schema.Description: Total cross-cohort re-tests of this mechanism.

schema.name: CountConcordantReplications
schema.Description: Re-tests reproducing the predicted sign at significance.

schema.name: CountCrossAncestryConcordant
schema.Description: Concordant re-tests that ran in a DIFFERENT ancestry (the transportability measurement).

schema.name: ReplicationFraction
schema.Description: Derived: fraction of re-tests that were concordant (guarded division).

schema.name: ReplicatesAcrossCohorts
schema.Description: Derived: >=2 independent re-tests and >=2 concordant.

schema.name: CountNegControlTests
schema.Description: Negative-control tests run on this mechanism.

schema.name: CountNegControlSurvived
schema.Description: Negative-control tests the mechanism survived (collapsed under the null).

schema.name: SurvivesNegativeControls
schema.Description: Derived: at least one control run AND all of them survived.

schema.name: IsSpuriousDerived
schema.Description: Derived: spurious unless replicated, survives controls, has >=2 modalities, and is not purely pleiotropic.

schema.name: CausalConfidence
schema.Description: Derived bounded blend of qualified-evidence count, modality breadth, replication rate, and control survival.
schema.formula: =IF(((0.30 * IF({{CountQualifiedEvidence}} >= 4, 1, {{CountQualifiedEvidence}} / 4)) + (0.20 * IF({{CountModalitiesSupporting}} >= 3, 1, {{CountModalitiesSupporting}} / 3)) + (0.30 * {{ReplicationFraction}}) + (0.20 * IF({{SurvivesNegativeControls}}, 1, 0))) > 1, 1, (0.30 * IF({{CountQualifiedEvidence}} >= 4, 1, {{CountQualifiedEvidence}} / 4)) + (0.20 * IF({{CountModalitiesSupporting}} >= 3, 1, {{CountModalitiesSupporting}} / 3)) + (0.30 * {{ReplicationFraction}}) + (0.20 * IF({{SurvivesNegativeControls}}, 1, 0)))

schema.name: VariantIsCausalCandidate
schema.Description: Whether the linked variant is itself a derived causal candidate (empty-guarded).

schema.name: IsCausalArchitectureNode
schema.Description: Derived: a confirmed causal edge - confident, falsifiable, non-spurious, and grounded in a candidate variant or a real exposure.

schema.name: IsAncestryTransportable
schema.Description: Derived: a confirmed node whose effect replicated in >=1 different ancestry (measured invariance).

schema.name: InterventionTargets
schema.Description: Intervention targets derived from this mechanism.

schema.name: EvidenceItems
schema.Description: Evidence items supporting this mechanism.

schema.name: CohortReplications
schema.Description: Cross-cohort replications of this mechanism.

schema.name: NegativeControlTests
schema.Description: Negative-control tests on this mechanism.

data.MechanismLabel: IRF5 regulatory -> type-I IFN -> SLE risk
IRF5 regulatory -> type-I IFN -> SLE risk
IRF5 regulatory -> type-I IFN -> SLE risk
CTLA4 enhancer -> T-cell costimulation -> SLE risk
IL23R regulatory -> IL-17 axis -> PsA risk
IL23R regulatory -> IL-17 axis -> PsA risk

EpistaticInteractions.Description: Higher-order epistasis and pleiotropy interactions between genomic variants.

schema.name: EpistaticInteractionId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each epistatic interaction.

schema.name: InteractionLabel
schema.Description: Human-readable interaction label.

schema.name: Individual
schema.Description: Individual exhibiting interaction.

schema.name: PrimaryVariant
schema.Description: First variant in interaction.

schema.name: SecondaryVariant
schema.Description: Second variant in interaction.

schema.name: EpistasisScore
schema.Description: Higher-order epistasis effect score (0-1).

schema.name: HasPleiotropy
schema.Description: True when interaction shows pleiotropy.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label.

schema.name: IsHighOrderEpistasis
schema.Description: True when epistasis score exceeds 0.5.

CounterfactualTrajectories.Description: Counterfactual disease trajectories inferred without randomized perturbation data.

schema.name: CounterfactualTrajectoryId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each counterfactual trajectory.

schema.name: TrajectoryLabel
schema.Description: Description of hypothetical scenario.

schema.name: Individual
schema.Description: Individual whose trajectory is modeled.

schema.name: AutoimmuneDisease
schema.Description: Target autoimmune disease.

schema.name: ProjectedSeverity
schema.Description: Projected severity under counterfactual (0-10).

schema.name: HorizonMonths
schema.Description: Prediction horizon in months.

schema.name: InterventionApplied
schema.Description: Hypothetical intervention (empty = no treatment).

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label.

schema.name: AutoimmuneDiseaseLabel
schema.Description: Disease label lookup.

schema.name: IsWorseningTrajectory
schema.Description: True when projected severity exceeds 7.

IndividualPredictions.Description: Predictions of disease onset, severity, treatment response, and adverse effects with calibrated uncertainty for ancestry-equitable risk prediction.

schema.name: IndividualPredictionId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each prediction record.

schema.name: PredictionLabel
schema.Description: Prediction type label.

schema.name: Individual
schema.Description: Individual predicted.

schema.name: AutoimmuneDisease
schema.Description: Target autoimmune disease.

schema.name: PredictionType
schema.Description: Onset, Severity, TreatmentResponse, or AdverseEffect.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label.

schema.name: IndividualAncestryLabel
schema.Description: Ancestry for equity audit.

schema.name: IsAncestryHoldout
schema.Description: True when individual ancestry absent from training.

schema.name: IndividualCausalMass
schema.Description: Summed confirmed causal confidence for this individual (empty-guarded).

schema.name: IndividualConfirmedNodeCount
schema.Description: Count of this individual's confirmed causal nodes (empty-guarded).

schema.name: IndividualCrossAncestryNodeCount
schema.Description: Count of this individual's cross-ancestry-replicated confirmed nodes (empty-guarded).

schema.name: IndividualHasCrypticRelatedness
schema.Description: Whether this individual carries a cryptic-relatedness leakage flag (empty-guarded).

schema.name: PredictedValue
schema.Description: Derived risk magnitude (0-10), a monotone function of validated causal mass only - rides mechanism, not ancestry correlation.

schema.name: CountBins
schema.Description: Total reliability bins for this prediction.

schema.name: CountWellCalibratedBins
schema.Description: Bins passing coverage and accuracy.

schema.name: SumBinAbsError
schema.Description: Summed reliability gap across this prediction's bins.

schema.name: MeanBinAbsError
schema.Description: Derived mean reliability gap; defaults to 1 (worst) when no bins exist.

schema.name: WellCalibratedFraction
schema.Description: Derived fraction of trustworthy bins (guarded division).

schema.name: CalibratedUncertainty
schema.Description: Derived reliability (HIGH = trustworthy): (1 - mean gap) scaled by well-covered-bin fraction; 0 for uncovered predictions.

schema.name: RestsOnConfirmedMechanism
schema.Description: Derived: grounded in >=1 validated mechanism.

schema.name: HasSpuriousCorrelationFlag
schema.Description: Derived: spurious if no validated mechanism OR cryptic-relatedness leakage.

schema.name: IsFalsifiabilityBacked
schema.Description: Derived: inherits falsifiability - every confirmed node required IsExperimentallyFalsifiable.

schema.name: IsTransportableToAbsentAncestry
schema.Description: Derived: a holdout individual is transportable only with >=1 cross-ancestry-replicated node and no spurious flag.

schema.name: IsAncestryTransportSafe
schema.Description: Derived: holdout requires measured transport; in-training is vacuously safe.

schema.name: IsHighConfidencePrediction
schema.Description: Derived: calibrated AND not spurious.

schema.name: PatientStratificationTier
schema.Description: Derived risk tier from the derived PredictedValue.

schema.name: IsClinicallyActionable
schema.Description: KEYSTONE: TRUE only when the prediction is high-confidence (calibrated + not spurious), falsifiability-backed, ancestry-transport-safe, and rests on a non-null derived magnitude.

schema.name: CalibrationBins
schema.Description: Reliability bins for this prediction.

CalibrationBins.Description: Per-prediction reliability-curve bins, seeded from the held-out coverage of this individual's own ancestry x disease. Calibration is an aggregation over these rows.

schema.name: CalibrationBinId
schema.Description: Stable id for this bin.

schema.name: BinLabel
schema.Description: Human label.

schema.name: IndividualPrediction
schema.Description: FK to the prediction this bin calibrates.

schema.name: PredictedProbabilityBand
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: predicted-probability midpoint of this bin (0-1).

schema.name: ObservedEventRate
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: empirical event rate among held-out cases in this band, matched to this individual's ancestry x disease.

schema.name: CoverageCount
schema.Description: OBSERVATION: number of held-out outcomes in this band for this ancestry x disease.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name.

schema.name: BinAbsError
schema.Description: Derived: absolute gap between predicted band and observed rate.

schema.name: IsWellCalibratedBin
schema.Description: Derived: enough held-out coverage AND small reliability gap.

InterventionTargets.Description: Validated intervention targets for gene-based and cell-based therapies derived from falsifiable causal mechanisms.

schema.name: InterventionTargetId
schema.Description: Stable identifier for each intervention target.

schema.name: TargetLabel
schema.Description: Target name (gene, pathway, cell type).

schema.name: CausalMechanism
schema.Description: Parent causal mechanism.

schema.name: AutoimmuneDisease
schema.Description: Target autoimmune disease.

schema.name: TherapyClass
schema.Description: Gene-based, Cell-based, or Environmental.

schema.name: IsValidated
schema.Description: True when target is validated for clinical trials.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display label.

schema.name: CausalMechanismLabel
schema.Description: Mechanism label lookup.

schema.name: IsGeneBasedTherapy
schema.Description: True when therapy class is gene-based.

schema.name: IsCellBasedTherapy
schema.Description: True when therapy class is cell-based.

_meta._CMCC_Summary: Loop 0: solve-by-inference rulebook for the Causal Autoimmune Architecture Platform. The keystone IndividualPredictions.IsClinicallyActionable is derived through a calculated-field DAG bottoming out only in raw observations.

_conversion_metadata.vocabulary_coverage: all domain terms in descriptions, field names, and data values
